--- Main Page ---
Smith & Lentz | East Nashville Pizza Joint & Brewery
0
Pizza. Beer. Wine. More.
East Nashville
Pizza
Beer
Wine
Order Online
What we do…
There’s only one size pizza here, about 16 inches, they’re all made with Carolina Ground Flour and a sourdough fermentation. Our kitchen team uses locally sourced produce from our nearby farmer friends, like Harpeth Moon Farms, Farm and Fiddle, Rosson Orchards, and Bells Bend Farm.
You can smell the difference ground wheat and fresh ingredients make, especially when you walk past our kitchen. And you’ll taste the difference the moment you dig in. We practice an uncompromising and sincere commitment to serving our guests the very best pizza in Nashville.
Bringing it all full circle is our original, artisanal ice cream.
We make it from scratch, using local dairy, and blending the unctuous with the unexpected.
If you insist on staying home and not visiting us, we're on Uber Eats.
Uber Eats
This Week's Menus
Our food, beer and wine menus change frequently including a pizza menu featuring local farms’ produce changing daily. The online ordering menu is always up to date (though we may have some features not available to go, so come visit us!)
View fullsize
Current Drink Menu
View fullsize
View fullsize
View fullsize
Rumor Has It…
See What East Nashville Has to Say About Us!
“
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Pies with a delicious firewood char. Unique specialty pizzas that are well balanced and keep you coming back for more slices. A loud, energetic environment, with lots of chatting and laughter. Great local beer selection on tap. Excellent place to meet up with friends!
”
— Christopher Heilman
“
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Overall, this has to be my favorite pizza spot in Nashville, considering the beer, the atmosphere and the food. They had great beers, offered outdoor seating with great vibes and the servers were always coming around to check on us. Loved the char on the pizza! I also enjoyed reading about the locally sourced ingredients and intention of paying a decent wage to staff - I’m totally willing to pay more when I know this context. I look forward to coming back!
”
— Haley Lundgren
“
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
We got the margarita pizza and it was so good. We asked for a side of garlic butter for the crust and that was a solid upgrade! We will definitely be back next time we are in town. The Sourdough and Brown Butter Caramel ice cream was elite. An absolute must order!
”
— Kaitlyn Levis
“
⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
First time at Smith & Lentz Brewing and Pizza over the weekend and we had a great time! A cool spot with great food. We ordered the sausage and spring onion pizza and it was fantastic. The staff members were welcoming and very attentive. I highly recommend Smith & Lentz Brewing and Pizza!
”
— S
Check out these features from The Pizza Snob, Barstool (One Bite Pizza Reviews), The Tennessean, and more!

--- Page: /blog/must-try-menu-east-nashville ---
Not Just Pizza: Five Must-Try Plates and Desserts at Smith & Lentz — Smith & Lentz Pizza & Brewing
0
Not Just Pizza: Five Must-Try Plates and Desserts at Smith & Lentz
Feb 17
Written By
GoEpps Logins
Here at Smith & Lentz, home to all the good things, we say go for it; the heart wants what the heart wants. From our homemade pizza made with a secret sourdough starter to our made-from-scratch ice creams featuring local dairy and deliciously irreverent pairings, there’s no saying no to what you’re in the mood for when food is at its best.
Beyond the Pizza: Five Must-Tries at Smith & Lentz
Looking for a great start to an amazing meal? We have an app for that. Our appetizer menu features beautiful briny olives warmed to perfection, goat cheese with olive oil and jam, fresh salads with greens, veggies, and fruits produced by our local farmer friends, and more.
Let’s begin at the beginning.
1. Sourdough Bread
A huge favorite here at our
East Nashville restaurant
is our homemade sourdough bread. We use it in our garlic bread, generously basted with garlic and served with a beautifully balanced herb butter. Warm, rustic, and comforting, our sourdough is crunchy on the outside, soft and airy on the inside. Pair the sourdough with our marinated olives, and you’re setting the stage for a ridiculously decadent dinner.
2. Farm Fresh Kale Caesar Salad
Fresh kale salad will leave you pining for more. This salad is a forever classic—a cornucopia of crisp, colorful, and local crave-worthy greens zhuzhed with Parmigiana Reggiano, tossed with homemade Caesar dressing spiked with a touch of great anchovies. Is it a salad or is it an indulgence? It’s both.
3. Gem Lettuce Salad
Looking for something a little different in the salad category? Try our Gem Lettuce Salad featuring organic Gem lettuce grown for us by Bountiful Blessings Farm in Williamsport, TN. Gem lettuces are a one-two combo of crisp and fresh. For the winter, we blend our Gem with satsumas from small orchards, seasonal farm veg, and a generous portion of tomme (a rustic semi-firm cheese that originated in the French Alps and Switzerland). This bounty is adorned with a generous pour of our green goddess dressing. Bringing it all home is a sprinkling of crunchy, salty pistachios. Pair this with any of our pizzas to keep things fresh.
4. Our Sourdough Brown Butter Caramel Ice Cream
Ready for dessert? Our
desserts
are the perfect ending to your dining experience at our shop in East Nashville. For starters, our Sourdough Brown Butter Caramel Ice Cream is unexpectedly sweet, savory, tangy, and rich. The brown butter gives this made-from-scratch dessert a nutty flavor, balanced by the caramel and punctuated by the complexities only sourdough can impart. Luscious, bright, and punchy, you have to try it (and come back for more).
5. Crema Coffee with Miso Caramel Ice Cream
Aromatic, freshly roasted coffee from our friends at
Crema
is soaked in luxurious
JD Country Milk
. After churning, we drizzle in layers of uma

Catering & Events | Smith & Lentz Brewing and Pizza — Smith & Lentz Pizza & Brewing
0
Did Someone Say Pizza Party?!
We hear you, East Nashville. We can cater your office meeting or house party! We just need orders at least 24 hours in advance.
Click the link below to place your order!
Order Here
Events & Group Reservations
Got a party or private event inquiry? Email
kurt@smithandlentz.com
.
Food & beverage minimums apply depending upon group size, day, and time. Also, no decorations allowed (don't worry; our space is plenty decorated already). Send along the date and time, number of guests, your budget and any other desirable details and we’ll hit you back with some options and suggestions.
Full buyouts are required for groups of 35.
For parties of ten (10) or more, we require one check.

--- Page: /catering-and-events-orig ---
Catering & Events | Smith & Lentz Brewing and Pizza — Smith & Lentz Pizza & Brewing
0
Did Someone Say Pizza Party?!
Take your East Nashville catered event up several notches with foodie-focused noshing of epic pizza proportions.
At Smith & Lentz, our pizzas, plates, salads, and desserts are all made to order, from scratch, using farm-fresh ingredients as often as humanly possible.
Treat your guests, office staff, or bulk gathering of family and friends to pizza on another plane thanks to locally sourced ingredients and stoneground flour from Carolina grains—the magic within a secret sourdough pizza crust recipe that rises and proofs on its own time. And we respect that.
It’s this, our uncompromising approach to every 16" pizza prep combined with our chef’s fresh sauces, high quality cheeses, and artisanal hits of unexpected hotness, sweetness, spiciness and even olivey brininess that delivers a pizza pie selection that’s a cut above the rest.
Give us the date and time of your event, give it a name, and tell us how many will be there.
Then fill your cart with traditional faves like the Supreme with sausage and soppressata, the Pepperoni with oregano and hot honey, and the Cheese with mozz and parm. Add the White with ricotta and mozza made even more excellent with garlic and fresh pepper, and don’t forget to include the ever-popular Cacio E Pepe with pecorino and a secret. Of course, you can’t leave out the Red and the Spicy Marg...
Yeah, that’s our main pizza menu. Your event’s already on track for greatness.
Pair your pizzas with our garlic bread and marinated olives to start, fresh Caesar and green salads that each serve 8, and the best chocolate chip cookies this side of music city.
Take your next event to the next level with pizza that satisfies and surprises. Book your dates, curate your menu, and prepare for a ton of foodie fanfare, all thanks to a higher order of pizza from Smith & Lentz on Main.

meta.meta_description:
East Nashville neighborhood pizza joint and brewery also serving good wine 
and ice cream. Patio beer garden is dog friendly. Nashville Scene's Best 
Pizza 2022!
